shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
Hazard bubbles keep a compact silhouette and transparent cutout.
differences: The boiling bubble uses a vertical stretch and four-frame burst.
Cream steam flecks separate it from deployable slimes.
The top rim opens slightly on the last frame to sell impact timing.

context.usage: Moving hazard that rises through open cells and damages the first slime on its route.

specs.texture: Bright bubble core with steam flecks and a narrow wake.
specs.shading: Flat fill with a bright top highlight.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet size is exactly 96x24px with 4 columns and 1 row.
The last frame reads as the highest-pressure state within the same 24x24px bounds.
The bubble remains distinguishable from deployable slimes at native scale.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle driven by a hazard movement system.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacles_boiling_bubble_rise_4f_12fps.png during the Loading state and keep the atlas handle in a hazard art resource.
runtime_notes: Advance motion in fixed board steps while sprite animation loops at 12 FPS.
Keep the sprite centered in one cell.
Trigger gameplay damage through an impact event.
